content: Do we have an alternative to a Sealed trait, or has the need just not come up yet?
Usually, a Sealed trait is not reused for several sealed things. You just make one for each thing you need to seal.
I have usually seen it as one per crate
I would say it kinda makes sense to have at most one per subsystem rfl wrappes. maybe even like said per thing. to have it nicer scoped. as file private and not as crate private
